g.text: PTE Bit Field Definitions (Intel x86 Manual)
5 | A | Accessed: Set by CPU on read
6 | D | Dirty: Set by CPU on write
7 | PAT | Page Attribute Table: Memory type
8 | G | Global: 1=not flushed on CR3 reload
